description_long: This is a white, plastic shampoo bottle with a distinctive, sculpted shape that flares out at the base and narrows toward the neck, topped with a matching cap. The front of the bottle features a worn label with the brand name 'SULFRIN' and Italian text indicating it is for dandruff-prone hair. The back label contains more detailed product information, also in Italian, and appears faded and partially illegible. The bottle's surface is visibly stained and dirty, suggesting it has been exposed to the elements or discarded in an urban environment. The cap is cylindrical and slightly tapered, likely a screw-on type, and the overall form is ergonomic, designed to fit comfortably in hand. There are no visible decorative graphics aside from the printed text and logo.
description: A stained, white plastic shampoo bottle with a sculpted, ergonomic shape and worn Italian labels, topped with a matching cap.
description_view_0: Front view shows the 'SULFRIN' logo and Italian text, with visible dirt and wear on the bottle's surface.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the bottle's curved, flared base and the extent of surface staining.
description_view_2: Back view reveals a faded, detailed label with product information in Italian and more pronounced discoloration.
description_view_3: Right side view displays the bottle's ergonomic contour and heavy staining along the side.
attribute_brand_logo: SULFRIN logo in bold, uppercase letters on the front label.
attribute_label_text: SULFRIN Per capelli con forfora SULFRIN Shampoo ... (text on back label is mostly illegible but includes 'Shampoo', 'Per capelli con forfora', and manufacturer details in Italian)
attribute_bottle_silhouette: Sculpted with a flared base, narrow waist, and rounded shoulders leading to a short neck.

license_info.creator_display_name: Archeoplastica: il museo dei rifiuti spiaggiati
